channel.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 14th - Jun 20th, 2021
item.description:
DevOps

  • Spawn - Cloud service for creating instant database copies for development and CI. No more local db installs, instant recovery to arbitrary save points, isolated copies for each feature branch or test. Instant provisioning regardless of database size.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 7th - Jun 13th, 2021
item.description:
GUI Managers/Clients

  • Beekeeper Studiostars5.9k - Open Source SQL Editor and Database Manager with a privacy commitment in their mission statement.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 31st - Jun 6th, 2021
item.description:
Wrappers

  • Saltcornstars298 - Open source no-code builder for web datatabase applications. Server and drag-and-drop UI builder, data stored in PostgreSQL or SQLite.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

    Prometheus

  • pgSCVstars56 - Metrics exporter for PostgreSQL and Postgres-related services.
  • postgres_exporterstars1.3k - Prometheus exporter for PostgreSQL server metrics.

    • Security

  • Databunkerstars750 - Special GDPR compliant secure vault for customer records built on top of regular DB.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Oct 19th - Oct 25th, 2020
item.description:
Wrappers

  • FBSQL Frontend Backend SQLstars13 - Work (secure) with your backend database within HTML.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Migration tools

  • Prisma Migratestars777 - Declarative database schema migration tool that uses a declarative data modeling syntax to describe your database schema.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 25th - May 31st, 2020
item.description:
Migration tools

  • yuniqlstars165 - Yet another schema versioning and migration tool just made with native .NET Core 3.0+ and hopefully better.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Mar 16th - Mar 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Distributions

  • dbatoolsstars1.5k - PowerShell module that you may think of like a command-line SQL Server Management Studio.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 24th - Mar 1st, 2020
item.description:
GUI Managers/Clients

  • SQLToolsstars767 - Database management for VSCode.

    • DB-schema navigation and visualization

  • tblsstars1k - CI-Friendly tool for document a database, written in Go.

    • CLI tools

  • iredisstars1.5k - A Cli for Redis with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Feb 10th - Feb 16th, 2020
item.description:
IDE

  • Toad Edge - Simplified database development tool for MySQL and Postgres.
  • PL/SQL Developer - IDE that is specifically targeted at the development of stored program units for Oracle Databases.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • SQLite Expert - Graphical interface supports all SQLite features.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 27th - Feb 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Wrappers

  • sandman2stars1.7k - Automatically generate a RESTful API service for your legacy database.

    • Configuration Tuning

  • MySQLTuner-perlstars6.8k - Script written in Perl that allows you to review a MySQL installation quickly and make adjustments to increase performance and stability.
  • postgresqltuner.plstars2.1k - Simple script to analyse your PostgreSQL database configuration, and give tuning advice.

    • Migration tools

  • Sqitchstars2.2k - Sensible database-native change management for framework-free development and dependable deployment.
  • SchemaHerostars310 - A Kubernetes operator for declarative database schema management (gitops for database schemas).

    • Code formatters

  • CodeBuffstars369 - Language-agnostic pretty-printing through machine learning.

    • Security

  • Acrastars749 - Database security suite. Database proxy with field-level encryption, search through encrypted data, SQL injections prevention, intrusion detection, honeypots. Supports client-side and proxy-side ("transparent") encryption. SQL, NoSQL.

    • Distributions

  • DBdeployerstars482 - Tool that deploys MySQL database servers easily.
  • Postgres.appstars5.7k - Full-featured PostgreSQL installation packaged as a standard Mac app.
  • BigSQL - A developer-friendly distribution of Postgres.
  • Elephant Shedstars148 - Web-based PostgreSQL management front-end that bundles several utilities and applications for use with PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • mssql-monitoringstars69 - Monitor your SQL Server on Linux performance using collectd, InfluxDB and Grafana.
  • ASH Viewerstars91 - Provides a graphical view of active session history data within the Oracle and PostgreSQL DB.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • postgresql_clusterstars322 - PostgreSQL High-Availability Cluster (based on "Patroni" and "DCS(etcd)"). Automating deployment with Ansible.

    • Testing

  • RegreSQLstars190 - Regression Testing your SQL queries.

    • Scripts

  • Postgres cheat sheet - Useful SQL-scripts and commands by <timescale.com>.
  • pgWikiDont - SQL test that checks if your database follows rules from https://wiki.postgresql.org/wiki/Don't_Do_This.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Configuration Tuning

  • PGConfigurator - Free online tool to generate an optimized postgresql.conf.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Dec 30th - Jan 5th, 2019
item.description:
Code generation tools

  • scheme2ddlstars61 - Command line util for export Oracle schema to set of ddl init scripts with ability to filter undesirable information, separate DDL in different files, pretty format output.

    • Wrappers

  • restSQLstars125 - SQL generator with Java and HTTP APIs, uses a simple RESTful HTTP API with XML or JSON serialization.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Dec 23rd - Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Replication/Data operation

  • repmgrstars1.2k - The Most Popular Replication Manager for PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Percona Monitoring and Managementstars200 - Open source platform for managing and monitoring MySQL and MongoDB performance.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • Citusstars4.8k - Postgres extension that distributes your data and your queries across multiple nodes.
  • patronistars4k - A template for PostgreSQL High Availability with ZooKeeper, etcd, or Consul.
  • Percona XtraDB Clusterstars261 - A High Scalability Solution for MySQL Clustering and High Availability.
  • stolonstars3.2k - Cloud native PostgreSQL manager for PostgreSQL high availability.
  • pg_auto_failoverstars588 - Postgres extension and service for automated failover and high-availability.
  • pglookoutstars131 - PostgreSQL replication monitoring and failover daemon.
  • PostgreSQL Automatic Failoverstars294 - High-Availibility for Postgres, based on industry references Pacemaker and Corosync.

    • Kubernetes

  • KubeDB - Making running production-grade databases easy on Kubernetes.
  • Postgres operatorstars1.8k - The Postgres Operator enables highly-available PostgreSQL clusters on Kubernetes (K8s) powered by Patroni.
  • Spilostars808 - HA PostgreSQL Clusters with Docker.
  • StackGres - Enterprise-grade, Full Stack PostgreSQL on Kubernetes.

    • Configuration Tuning

  • pgtunestars940 - PostgreSQL configuration wizard.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

Zabbix

  • pg_monzstars164 - This is the Zabbix monitoring template for PostgreSQL Database.
  • Mamonsustars152 - Monitoring agent for PostgreSQL.
  • ZabbixDBAstars70 - ZabbixDBA is fast, flexible, and continuously developing plugin to monitor your RDBMS.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Oct 21st - Oct 27th, 2019
item.description:
Wrappers

  • sql-bootstars52 - Advanced REST and UI wrapper for your SQL-queries.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 8th - Jul 14th, 2019
item.description:
IDE

  • IBExpert - Comprehensive GUI tool for Firebird and InterBase.
  • pgAdmin3 - Long Term Support for pgAdmin3.
  • dbKodastars807 - Modern (JavaScript/Electron framework), open source IDE for MongoDB. It has features to support development, administration and performance tuning on MongoDB databases.

    • Scripts

  • TPTstars438 - These sqlplus scripts are for Oracle Database performance optimization & troubleshooting.
  • postgres_queries_and_commands.sql - Useful PostgreSQL Queries and Commands.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Telegraf PostgreSQL plugin - Provides metrics for your postgres database.
  • postgres-checkup - New-generation diagnostics tool that allows users to do a deep analysis of the health of Postgres databases.

    • HA/Failover/Sharding

  • Vitessstars11.8k - Database clustering system for horizontal scaling of MySQL through generalized sharding.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • PopSQL - Modern, collaborative SQL editor for your team.

    • Reporting

  • Polistars1.8k - An easy-to-use SQL reporting application built for SQL lovers.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Mar 25th - Mar 31st, 2019
item.description:
Migration tools

  • migrastars2k - Like diff but for PostgreSQL schemas.

    • Wrappers

  • jl-sqlstars51 - SQL for JSON and CSV streams.
  • Hasura GraphQL Enginestars21.6k - Blazing fast, instant realtime GraphQL APIs on Postgres with fine grained access control, also trigger webhooks on database events.

    • CLI tools

    dbcli

  • athenaclistars153 - AthenaCLI is a CLI tool for AWS Athena service that can do auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • liteclistars1.4k - CLI for SQLite Databases with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • mssql-clistars1.1k - A command-line client for SQL Server with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.
  • myclistars9.6k - A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.
  • pgclistars9.6k - Postgres CLI with autocompletion and syntax highlighting.
  • vclistars76 - Vertica CLI with auto-completion and syntax highlighting.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • sqlpadstars3.7k - Web-based SQL editor run in your own private cloud.
  • JackDB - Direct SQL access to all your data, no matter where it lives.
  • DbVisualizer - Universal database tool for developers, DBAs and analysts.
  • SQLyog - The most complete and easy to use MySQL GUI.
  • SQuirreL - Graphical SQL client written in Java that will allow you to view the structure of a JDBC compliant database, browse the data in tables, issue SQL commands etc.
  • Sequel Prostars8.3k - Sequel Pro is a fast, easy-to-use Mac database management application for working with MySQL & MariaDB databases.
  • phpLiteAdmin - Web-based SQLite database admin tool written in PHP with support for SQLite3 and SQLite2.
  • SQLPro - A simple, powerful Postgres manager for macOS.
  • psequel - PSequel provides a clean and simple interface for you to perform common PostgreSQL tasks quickly.
  • TeamPostgreSQL - PostgreSQL Web Administration GUI - use your PostgreSQL databases from anywhere, with rich, lightning-fast AJAX web interface.

    • Replication/Data operation

  • dtlestars353 - Distributed Data Transfer Service for MySQL.
  • Datasettestars5.1k - A tool for exploring and publishing data.
  • pgsyncstars2k - Sync Postgres data between databases.

    • Administration

  • pgslicestars734 - Postgres partitioning as easy as pie.
  • pgbedrockstars267 - Manage a Postgres cluster's roles, role memberships, schema ownership, and privileges.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Monyog - Agentless & Cost-effective MySQL Monitoring Tool.
  • pgMustard - A user interface for Postgres explain plans, plus tips to improve performance.

    • IDE

  • Valentina Studio - Create, administer, query and explore Valentina DB, MySQL, MariaDB, PostgreSQL and SQLite databases for FREE.
  • MySQL Workbench - MySQL Workbench is a unified visual tool for database architects, developers, and DBAs.
  • PostgreSQL Maestro - Complete and powerful database management, admin and development tool for PostgreSQL.
  • AnySQL Maestro - Premier multi-purpose admin tool for database management, control and development.
  • TOrastars246 - TOra is an open source SQL IDE for Oracle, MySQL and PostgreSQL dbs.

    • CLI tools

  • pg_topstars93 - 'top' for PostgreSQL.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Oct 1st - Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Migration tools

  • gh-oststars8.8k - Online schema migration for MySQL.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • Pgwebstars6.9k - Web-based database browser for PostgreSQL, written in Go and works on macOS, Linux and Windows machines.

    • Testing

    Data generator

  • Databene Benerator - It is a framework for generating realistic and valid high-volume test data for your system under test (avoiding the Datalite anti-pattern).

    • Schema samples

  • Oracle Database Sample Schemasstars401 - Oracle Database Sample Schemas.

    • DB-schema navigation and visualization

  • dbdiagram.io - Quick and simple tool for help you draw your database relationship diagrams and flow quickly using simple DSL language.

    • Code generation tools

  • ddl-generatorstars218 - Infers SQL DDL (Data Definition Language) from table data.

    • CLI tools

  • ipython-sqlstars1.4k - Connect to a database for issue SQL commands within IPython or IPython Notebook.
  • pg_activitystars11 - Top like application for PostgreSQL server activity monitoring.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 24th - Sep 30th, 2018
item.description:
Wrappers

  • mysql_fdwstars366 - PostgreSQL foreign data wrapper for MySQL.

    • Replication/Data operation

  • pg_chameleonstars278 - MySQL to PostgreSQL replica system written in Python 3. The system use the library mysql-replication to pull the row images from MySQL which are stored into PostgreSQL as JSONB.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Testing

Data generator

  • dbForge Data Generator for MySQL - Powerful GUI tool for creating massive volumes of realistic test data.
  • dbForge Data Generator for Oracle - Small but mighty GUI tool for populating Oracle schemas with tons of realistic test data.
  • dbForge Data Generator for SQL Server - Powerful GUI tool for a fast generation of meaningful test data for databases.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • HouseOpsstars211 - Enterprise ClickHouse Ops UI for you run querys, monitoring ClickHouse health and make a lot of others thinks.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Sep 3rd - Sep 9th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • dbForge Studio for MySQL - Universal IDE for MySQL and MariaDB database development, management, and administration.
  • dbForge Studio for Oracle - Powerful IDE for Oracle management, administration, and development.
  • dbForge Studio for PostgreSQL - GUI tool for managing and developing databases and objects.
  • dbForge Studio for SQL Server - Powerful integrated development environment for SQL Server development, management, administration, data analysis, and reporting.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 30th - Aug 5th, 2018
item.description:
GUI Managers/Clients

  • OmniDBstars2.4k - Web tool for database management.
  • SQL Operations Studiostars6.3k - A data management tool that enables working with SQL Server, Azure SQL DB and SQL DW from Windows, macOS and Linux.

    • Wrappers

  • DreamFactorystars1.2k - A open source REST API backend for mobile, web, and IoT applications.

    • Replication/Data operation

  • PGDeltaStreamstars201 - A Golang webserver to stream Postgres changes atleast-once over websockets, using Postgres logical decoding feature.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgDash - Measure and track every aspect of your PostgreSQL databases.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jul 2nd - Jul 8th, 2018
item.description:
Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgwatch2stars991 - Flexible self-contained PostgreSQL metrics monitoring/dashboarding solution.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 18th - Jun 24th, 2018
item.description:
Migration tools

  • node-pg-migratestars854 - Node.js database migration management built exclusively for postgres. (But can also be used for other DBs conforming to SQL standard - e.g. CockroachDB.)

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • Robo 3Tstars8.6k - Robo 3T (formerly Robomongo) is a shell-centric cross-platform MongoDB management tool.
  • Tabixstars1.2k - SQL Editor & Open source simple business intelligence for Clickhouse.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • PgHerostars5.9k - A performance dashboard for Postgres - health checks, suggested indexes, and more.
  • pganalyze collectorstars201 - Pganalyze statistics collector for gathering PostgreSQL metrics and log data.
  • pgstatsstars94 - Collects PostgreSQL statistics, and either saves them in CSV files or print them on the stdout.

    • IDE

  • Toad - Toad is the premier database solution for developers, admins and data analysts. Manage complex database changes with a single database management tool.
  • Oracle SQL Developer - Oracle SQL Developer is a free, integrated development environment that simplifies the development and management of Oracle Database in both traditional and Cloud deployments.

    • DevOps

  • Toad DevOps Toolkit - Toad DevOps Toolkit executes key database development functions within your DevOps workflow —without compromising quality, performance or reliability.

    • Modelers

  • Oracle SQL Developer Data Modeler - Oracle SQL Developer Data Modeler is a free graphical tool that enhances productivity and simplifies data modeling tasks.

    • CLI tools

  • SQLcl - Oracle SQL Developer Command Line (SQLcl) is a free command line interface for Oracle Database.

    • Testing

  • DbFitstars194 - A database testing framework that supports easy test-driven development of your database code.

    • DB-schema navigation and visualization

  • ERAlchemystars794 - Entity Relation Diagrams generation tool.
  • SchemaCrawlerstars1.1k - A free database schema discovery and comprehension tool.
  • Schema Spystars1.8k - Generating your database to HTML documentation, including Entity Relationship diagrams.

    • Administration

  • pgbadgerstars17 - A fast PostgreSQL Log Analyzer.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 11th - Jun 17th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • Aqua Data Studio - Aqua Data Studio is productivity software for Database Developers, DBAs, and Analysts.
  • HeidiSQLstars2.5k - A lightweight client for managing MySQL, MSSQL and PostgreSQL, written in Delphi.
  • Navicat - A database development tool that allows you to simultaneously connect to MySQL, MariaDB, SQL Server, Oracle, PostgreSQL, and SQLite databases from a single application.
  • pgAdmin - The most popular and feature rich Open Source administration and development platform for PostgreSQL, the most advanced Open Source database in the world.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • Adminerstars4.7k - Database management in a single PHP file.
  • phpMyAdminstars5.5k - A web interface for MySQL and MariaDB.
  • Postico - A Modern PostgreSQL Client for the Mac.

    • Modelers

  • Navicat Data Modeler - A powerful and cost-effective database design tool which helps you build high-quality conceptual, logical and physical data models.

    • Scripts

  • pgx_scriptsstars899 - A collection of useful little scripts for database analysis and administration, created by our team at PostgreSQL Experts.
  • pgsql-bloat-estimationstars291 - Queries to mesure statistical bloat in indexes and tables for PostgreSQL.
  • pg-utilsstars536 - Useful PostgreSQL utilities.
  • postgres_dbastars540 - The missing set of useful tools for Postgres DBAs and all engineers.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • Navicat Monitor - A safe, simple and agentless remote server monitoring tool that is packed with powerful features to make your monitoring effective as possible.

    • DevOps

  • DBmaestro - DBmaestro accelerates release cycles & supports agility across the entire IT ecosystem.

    • Backup tools

  • pgbackreststars818 - Reliable PostgreSQL Backup & Restore.

    • CLI tools

  • usqlstars6.4k - A universal command-line interface for PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle Database, SQLite3, Microsoft SQL Server, and many other databasesstars6.4k including NoSQL and non-relational databases!

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools Jun 4th - Jun 10th, 2018
item.description:
Wrappers

  • preststars2.7k - Is a way to serve a RESTful API from any databases written in Go.
  • resquelstars86 - Easily convert your SQL database into a REST API.
  • Oracle REST Data Services - A mid-tier Java application, ORDS maps HTTP(S) verbs (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.) to database transactions and returns any results formatted using JSON.

    • IDE

  • DataGrip - Cross-Platform IDE for Databases & SQL by JetBrains.
  • DBeaverstars20.5k - Free universal database manager and SQL client.

    • CLI tools

  • pspgstars1.6k - Postgres Pager.

    • Backup tools

  • BaRManstars1.1k - Backup and Recovery Manager for PostgreSQL.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

  • pgmetricsstars623 - Collect and display information and stats from a running PostgreSQL server.

    • Monitoring/Statistics/Perfomance

    Zabbix

  • Orabbix - Orabbix is a plugin designed to work with Zabbix Enterprise Monitor to provide multi-tiered monitoring, performance and availability reporting and measurement for Oracle Databases, along with server performance metrics.
  • Pyorastars96 - Python script to monitor Oracle Databases.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 28th - Jun 3rd, 2018
item.description:
CLI tools

  • pgcenterstars1.2k - Top-like admin tool for PostgreSQL.

item.title: mgramin/awesome-db-tools May 14th - May 20th, 2018
item.description:
IDE

  • Database .net - Multiple database management tool with support for 20+ databases.

    • GUI Managers/Clients

  • TablePlusstars2.4k - Modern, native, and friendly GUI tool for relational databases: MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite & more.

    • Modelers

  • pgmodelerstars2.2k - Data modeling tool designed for PostgreSQL.

    • Migration tools

  • 2bassstars29 - Database configuration-as-code tool that utilizes concept of idempotent DDL scripts.
  • flywaystars5.9k - Database migration tool.
  • liquibasestars2.6k - Database-independent library for tracking, managing and applying database schema changes.
  • Pyrseasstars303 - Provides utilities to describe a PostgreSQL database schema as YAML.

    • Wrappers

  • Prismastars16.9k - Prisma turns your database into a realtime GraphQL API.
  • PostgRESTstars17k - REST API for any Postgres database.
